visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with a flat cap, glasses, and a grey sweatshirt stands in an indoor tech retail store environment. He holds a smartphone and gestures expressively while speaking to the camera. Behind him are shelves with various electronic products and a large white air purifier box labeled "WINIX MASTER". (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of a compact, silver and black AGI ED138 Pro external SSD held between his fingers to demonstrate its small size, comparable to a thumb. He rotates the device to show the USB Type-C and Type-A dual connectors. (3) The video shows the SSD being plugged into a silver laptop. A screen recording of the laptop interface demonstrates file browsing. Then, a close-up of an iPhone screen displays video settings for ProRes 4K 60fps, showing an on-screen warning about the necessity of external storage for this recording mode. (4) The man plugs the SSD directly into the bottom of the iPhone. He records a short video clips, and the interface indicates that files are being written to the external drive. He then navigates through the iPhone's "Files" app, showing an "AGI" folder containing the recorded video files. (5) Returning to a medium shot, the man speaks to the camera while holding the SSD. The final shots show a display shelf filled with packaged AGI ED138 Pro units with promotional pricing and technical specifications listed on the packaging. He concludes with a hand gesture towards the products.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c 有意思 tim 哥. @3ctim. [Variety]: 好煩惱?! [Subtitle]: 還在糾結要買. (2) [Variety]: 多大的 iPhone17 Pro? [Subtitle]: 算一算喔 儲存容量. (3) [Variety]: 多一倍 要多5-6千. [Subtitle]: 多一倍要多5-6千. (4) [Slogan]: AGI ED138 Pro 外接SSD. [Variety]: 就對啦!! [Subtitle]: 買這個! AGI ED138 Pro 外接SSD 就對啦!! (5) [Variety]: 容量呢?? [Subtitle]: 你看 大小跟我小拇指一樣 容量呢?? 有1TB喔. (6) [Variety]: 好方便!! [Subtitle]: 再插入電腦、筆電 甚至於電視上 就可以直接播放. (7) [Subtitle]: 如果你想要拍 PRORES 4K 60fps 的影片. (8) [Variety]: 需要外部儲存裝置的提醒. [Subtitle]: 畫面就會跳出 需要外部儲存裝置的提醒啦. (9) [Variety]: 全部可以. [Subtitle]: 全部都可以. (10) [Variety]: 大概6-7GB. [Subtitle]: 錄一分鐘檔案 大概6-7GB. (11) [Variety]: 傳輸速度超快. [Subtitle]: 傳輸速度超快. (12) [Variety]: 沒備份?! 擔心手機容量不足?. [Subtitle]: 擔心手機容量不足的. (13) [Slogan]: 全部的AGI ED138 PRO. [Subtitle]: 全部的AGI ED138 PRO. (14) [Subtitle]: 更多資訊 在資訊欄 給你參考.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a grey sweatshirt, a patterned flat cap, and glasses.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An electronics store interior with wooden stairs, product display shelves, and large appliances like an air purifier in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A solo male voice speaks with high energy and clarity in Traditional Chinese, maintaining a friendly yet professional tone. He explains the dilemma of iPhone storage costs. An upbeat, mid-tempo electronic BGM with a clear 4/4 beat plays consistently in the background. (2) A bright "pop" or "bubble" sound effect triggers a transition as he introduces the AGI SSD. The vocal intensity remains high as he emphasizes the device's small size and 1TB capacity. (3) A digital "ding" SFX marks the demonstration of the dual USB ports. The music continues with a steady pulse. The speaker’s speech rate is fast and instructional, with high pitch variability for emphasis. (4) A "whoosh" transition sound occurs as the scene moves to the laptop and iPhone screen demos. The speaker describes the functionality of the device for 4K video recording. The background music remains slightly ducked under the primary vocal signal. (5) The speaker concludes with a high-arousal summary, his voice projecting confidence. A final impact SFX and a short musical stinger play as he encourages viewers to check the information in the description box.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Problem Identification (iPhone storage cost) -> Solution Introduction (AGI SSD) -> Physical Features -> Functional Demonstration (Laptop/iPhone) -> Commercial Availability (Retail shelf)
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the AGI ED138 Pro external SSD as a cost-effective and portable solution for expanding iPhone storage, particularly for high-bandwidth video recording (ProRes 4K).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on the AGI SSD, showing its packaging, features, real-world usage demo, and retail pricing on store shelves.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard social media tech-influencer format with high-density text overlays and fast-paced editing to maintain engagement. It specifically targets iPhone users concerned with storage limitations.
